scan.oilUp:
Last test found increased scalp oil, retest recommended today.
Possible causes:
1. Core mechanisms:
  - Overactive sebaceous glands: Androgens (esp. DHT) stimulate sebum production (J Invest Dermatol 2022)
  - Microbial imbalance: Malassezia uses sebum, causing inflammation (Exp Dermatol 2023)
  - Barrier dysfunction: Over-cleansing → water loss → compensatory oil (Br J Dermatol 2021)
2. Aggravating factors:
  - Climate: Hot/humid accelerates sebum oxidation (+15% sebum)
  - Behavior: Frequent shampooing (>1/day) disrupts pH balance.
scan.densityDown:
Last test found density decreased, retest recommended.
Possible causes of hair loss:
1. Common types & mechanisms:
- Androgenetic alopecia (AGA): Follicle miniaturization, terminal→vellus. Markers: ↑serum DHT, ↑follicle AR sensitivity
- Telogen effluvium (TE): Anagen/telogen imbalance (>25%). Markers: ferritin<30μg/L, abnormal TSH
- Alopecia areata (AA): Autoimmune follicle attack. Markers: ↑serum IL-15, ↑TNF-α
2. Triggers/aggravators:
- Nutritional deficiency: ferritin<50μg/L, vitamin D<30ng/mL
- Stress: surgery/infection/trauma 3-6 months ago (TE)
- Drugs: anticoagulants, chemo, excess vitamin A.
scan.rednessUp:
Last test found increased sensitivity, retest recommended.
Possible causes:
1. Core mechanisms:
- Barrier dysfunction: TEWL>15g/m²/h. Markers: ↓filaggrin, lipid disorder
- Neurogenic: Itching/stinging (no visible inflammation). Markers: ↑substance P, TRPV1 activation
- Immune/inflammatory: Erythema/scaling (CD4+T infiltration). Markers: ↑IL-31, ↑IL-17A
2. Common triggers:
- Exogenous: Hard water (Ca²⁺>100mg/L), SLS/SLES detergents
- Endogenous: Atopy, anxiety/depression (HPA axis activation).
scan.scurfUp:
Last test found increased dandruff/keratin, retest recommended.
Possible causes:
1. Core mechanisms:
- Seborrheic dermatitis: Yellow greasy scales + erythema. Marker: Malassezia overgrowth (M. globosa)
- Dry dandruff: Fine white scales, no inflammation. Marker: barrier damage (↓ceramide) + low humidity
- Psoriasis: Thick silvery scales, Auspitz sign. Marker: IL-17/IL-23 pathway
2. Aggravators:
- Behavior: Over-cleansing (>1/day), hot water (>38℃)
- Environment: PM2.5>50μg/m³ increases dandruff 2.3x (J Dermatol Sci 2023).
scan.follicleDown:
Last test found follicle atrophy, retest recommended.
Possible causes:
1. Core mechanisms:
- Androgenic atrophy: Miniaturization (<0.02mm). Marker: ↑follicle DHT, ↑AR expression
- Inflammatory: Fibrosis + lymphocyte infiltration. Marker: ↑TGF-β1, ↑IL-17
- Aging: Dermal papilla stem cell depletion, Auspitz+. Marker: ↓CD34+, Wnt/β-catenin inhibition
2. Accelerators:
- Oxidative stress: Smoking ↑atrophy risk 2.4x (JID 2023)
- Mechanical: Long-term ponytail (tension>50g/cm²).
scan.noProblem: No issues found in last test, keep it up!
scan.noAbnormalityFound: No abnormalities detected, keep up the good work!
